game_name: Home Alone 2: Lost in New York

design_philosophy.core_loop: Navigate New York City locations, defeat enemies using combat moves and weapons, collect power-ups to maintain health
design_philosophy.primary_tension: Resource management (health via power-up collection) balanced against enemy encounters across themed locations
design_philosophy.player_fantasy: Play as Kevin McCallister from the film, using improvised combat and movie-referenced items to overcome pursuers across iconic NYC locations
design_philosophy.what_makes_it_opinionated: Faithful film adaptation with movie-specific mechanics (necklace trip trap, dart gun, after-shave power-up). Action-heavy interpretation rather than stealth/puzzle-focused approach despite source material emphasis on home defense traps

difficulty.lives_system: Multiple lives; Game Over occurs when all lives exhausted
difficulty.checkpointing: Level-based progression with checkpoint between locations
difficulty.player_agency_in_difficulty: Limited; fixed difficulty with standard power-up distribution. No difficulty settings documented

progression.upgrade_system: Consumable power-ups (Pizza Slices, Whole Pies, Cookies, Bells, Candy Canes, After Shave) restore health; weapons include Dart Gun and Necklace utility item
progression.unlock_mechanism: Level progression through New York City locations: Plaza Hotel, Central Park, Uncle Rob's townhouse, NYC streets
replayability_hooks: High score/speedrun potential in arcade-style level progression
Multiple platform versions with varying difficulty curves
Unused content suggests developer planned expanded scope

world_building_techniques: Location-based progression mirrors film narrative arc
Enemy types and settings reference film scenes
Necklace mechanic directly references pearls scene from movie
Environmental storytelling through iconic NYC landmarks

faction_indicators: Pursuers (Harry and Marv implied through enemy types)
danger_signals: Enemy variety in different locations escalates challenge
Pursuit mechanics create pressure across levels
environmental_storytelling: Plaza Hotel setting establishes upscale NYC locale
Central Park represents mid-game environment shift
Uncle Rob's townhouse serves as familiar safe location

sources_used: tcrf - Home Alone 2: Lost in New York (SNES) - The Cutting Room Floor
wikipedia - Home Alone 2: Lost in New York (video game)
